title: Software Metadata Extraction from Code Repositories: An overview
author: Garijo, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Brief presentation on the importance of metadata extraction from code repositories, along with the means on how to carry it out with SOMEF, a software metadata extraction framework https://github.com/KnowledgeCaptureAndDiscovery/somef/ 
 These slised were presented at the 2024 deRSE workshop session on "Software metadata extraction for Software Management Plans" (https://pad.gwdg.de/GuIPwJVFTAqyfH_n5rj0xg#)
